diagrams.title: Memory Layout: Return by Value vs Reference
diagrams.description: Shows how objects are stored in memory when returned by value vs by reference
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory allocation and lifetime differences between return methods

diagrams.title: RVO Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of how Return Value Optimization eliminates copy operations
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how compiler optimization improves performance

diagrams.title: Dangling Reference Scenario
diagrams.description: Shows how dangling references are created when returning references to local variables
elements: Persisting Reference Arrow to Invalid Memory
diagrams.purpose: Understand the danger of returning references to local variables

diagrams.title: Object Lifetime with Temporary Binding
diagrams.description: Shows how binding temporaries to const references extends their lifetime
diagrams.purpose: Understand temporary object lifetime rules with references
